story.iWant: jOOQ configured for type-safe SQL queries on projection tables
story.soThat: read models are queryable with compile-time safety

tasks.task: Configure jOOQ code generation in build.gradle.kts
Write integration test with type-safe queries
Commit: "Add jOOQ configuration and Widget projection table"

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: jOOQ code generation configured in Gradle (generates classes from DB schema)
Flyway migration V100__widget_projections.sql creates widget_view table
jOOQ generated classes available for widget_view table
Integration test validates jOOQ query execution

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: jOOQ 3.20.8 for type-safe projection queries. Code generation from DB schema. Compile-time safety for read models.

doc.title: Decision Architecture
doc.snippet: jOOQ 3.20.8 with KotlinGenerator. DSLContext bean for type-safe queries. Gradle code generation from PostgreSQL schema. Generated classes in build/generated-src/jooq/.

doc.title: Epic 2 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: jOOQ 3.20.8 configuration with DSLContext bean. Gradle code generation configured. V100__widget_projections.sql creates widget_view table. Generated WIDGET_VIEW table class available for type-safe queries.

dependency.name: jooq-core
dependency.usage: jOOQ core library for type-safe SQL

dependency.name: jooq-codegen
dependency.usage: jOOQ code generation from DB schema

dependency.name: postgresql
dependency.usage: PostgreSQL JDBC for jOOQ code generation

constraints.constraint: jOOQ code generation from database schema (not manual classes)
Use KotlinGenerator for jOOQ code generation
Product migrations V100+, Framework migrations V001-V099
Include only projection tables in code generation (.*_view pattern)
Generated code in build/ directory (not src/)

interface.name: DSLContext
interface.signature: interface DSLContext { selectFrom(Table<T>): SelectWhereStep<T>, insertInto(Table<T>): InsertSetStep<T> }
interface.purpose: jOOQ fluent API for type-safe SQL queries

pattern.name: jOOQ Configuration Pattern
jOOQ Gradle Code Generation Pattern

ideas.idea: Verify jOOQ 3.20.8 dependency in framework/persistence build.gradle.kts
Test DSLContext bean is available in Spring context
Test DSLContext is configured with PostgreSQL dialect
Verify jOOQ Gradle plugin configured in build.gradle.kts
Verify KotlinGenerator configured for code generation
Verify widget_view schema: id, name, published, created_at, updated_at
Verify generated WIDGET_VIEW class exists in build/generated-src/jooq/
Verify WIDGET_VIEW has column accessors (ID, NAME, PUBLISHED, etc.)
Manual: Document type-safe query example in README
Integration test: insert row via jOOQ DSLContext
Integration test: select row via jOOQ DSLContext with type-safe API
Integration test: verify compile-time safety (wrong column name fails compilation)
Verify ./gradlew generateJooq task exists and runs successfully
